title: internal/audit/audit.go
definition_of_done: audit.Load: walks ops/*.log, merges by timestamp, applies Filter, marks LostRace via claim.ResolveClaim. Tests: all-ops, filter-by-issue, filter-by-worker, filter-by-since, lost-race, empty-dir.
outcome: Created internal/audit/audit.go with Load function: walks ops/*.log, merges by timestamp, applies Filter (by issue/worker/since), marks LostRace via claim.ResolveClaim. Tests: all-ops, filter-by-issue, filter-by-worker, filter-by-since, lost-race, empty-dir, non-existent-dir. All pass.
